default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Kickoff meeting between Prophecy and GrowthX to align on content strategy and organic growth initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/gvd-sLvSPCav3T9LVWsDMA4yzydWM_Kq?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Prophecy aims to accelerate demand gen by complementing event-focused efforts with organic traffic growth](https://fathom.video/share/gvd-sLvSPCav3T9LVWsDMA4yzydWM_Kq?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Current focus is on enterprise customers using Databricks, with goal of unlocking data access bottlenecks](https://fathom.video/share/gvd-sLvSPCav3T9LVWsDMA4yzydWM_Kq?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [GrowthX will develop content strategy, leveraging AI to increase velocity while maintaining quality](https://fathom.video/share/gvd-sLvSPCav3T9LVWsDMA4yzydWM_Kq?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Team will prioritize content that maps to sales plays/campaigns while addressing audience pain points](https://fathom.video/share/gvd-sLvSPCav3T9LVWsDMA4yzydWM_Kq?tab=summary&timestamp=1220.0)

## Topics

### Current Marketing Approach and Goals

  - [Heavily reliant on ABM and events, looking to diversify channels and lower acquisition costs](https://fathom.video/share/gvd-sLvSPCav3T9LVWsDMA4yzydWM_Kq?tab=summary&timestamp=1034.0)
  - [Aiming for 4x pipeline coverage in Q1 2025, organic efforts to help fill gap](https://fathom.video/share/gvd-sLvSPCav3T9LVWsDMA4yzydWM_Kq?tab=summary&timestamp=1220.0)
  - [Key metrics: New ARR, overall ARR growth (doubling/tripling range), pipeline contribution, cost per lead](https://fathom.video/share/gvd-sLvSPCav3T9LVWsDMA4yzydWM_Kq?tab=summary&timestamp=1234.0)
  - [Shifting focus to data platform/analytics leaders vs end users](https://fathom.video/share/gvd-sLvSPCav3T9LVWsDMA4yzydWM_Kq?tab=summary&timestamp=1047.0)

### Target Audience and Pain Points

  - [Enterprise Databricks customers (2000+, 300 with $1M+ spend)](https://fathom.video/share/gvd-sLvSPCav3T9LVWsDMA4yzydWM_Kq?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)
  - [Key pain: Data access bottlenecks despite major investments in data infrastructure](https://fathom.video/share/gvd-sLvSPCav3T9LVWsDMA4yzydWM_Kq?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)
  - [Audience includes data engineers, data scientists, analysts](https://fathom.video/share/gvd-sLvSPCav3T9LVWsDMA4yzydWM_Kq?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)
  - [Gartner and other analysts have significant influence on target audience](https://fathom.video/share/gvd-sLvSPCav3T9LVWsDMA4yzydWM_Kq?tab=summary&timestamp=1449.0)

### Content Strategy Approach

  - [Build out "content clusters" around key topics, campaigns, and audience pain points](https://fathom.video/share/gvd-sLvSPCav3T9LVWsDMA4yzydWM_Kq?tab=summary&timestamp=1151.0)
  - [Leverage existing assets (e.g. CEO whitepapers) as starting points for new content](https://fathom.video/share/gvd-sLvSPCav3T9LVWsDMA4yzydWM_Kq?tab=summary&timestamp=1309.0)
  - [Focus on problems/outcomes vs technical jargon (e.g. "ETL modernization")](https://fathom.video/share/gvd-sLvSPCav3T9LVWsDMA4yzydWM_Kq?tab=summary&timestamp=1329.0)
  - [Aim for mix of timely, link-building content and evergreen, pipeline-driving pieces](https://fathom.video/share/gvd-sLvSPCav3T9LVWsDMA4yzydWM_Kq?tab=summary&timestamp=1192.0)

### GrowthX Process and Tools

  - [Will use AI to increase content velocity while maintaining quality](https://fathom.video/share/gvd-sLvSPCav3T9LVWsDMA4yzydWM_Kq?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Building custom knowledge base from Prophecy materials](https://fathom.video/share/gvd-sLvSPCav3T9LVWsDMA4yzydWM_Kq?tab=summary&timestamp=1375.0)
  - [Can add unique POV/enrichment as post-processing step](https://fathom.video/share/gvd-sLvSPCav3T9LVWsDMA4yzydWM_Kq?tab=summary&timestamp=1467.0)
  - [Will present initial content strategy next week, start calibrating with 1-2 sample pieces](https://fathom.video/share/gvd-sLvSPCav3T9LVWsDMA4yzydWM_Kq?tab=summary&timestamp=1540.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to develop initial content strategy for review next week](https://fathom.video/share/gvd-sLvSPCav3T9LVWsDMA4yzydWM_Kq?tab=summary&timestamp=1540.0)
  - [Prophecy to share additional context/materials via Slack (Google Drive access, specific asset requests)](https://fathom.video/share/gvd-sLvSPCav3T9LVWsDMA4yzydWM_Kq?tab=summary&timestamp=1525.0)
  - [Schedule recurring weekly meeting (preferably Wed/Thurs)](https://fathom.video/share/gvd-sLvSPCav3T9LVWsDMA4yzydWM_Kq?tab=summary&timestamp=1609.0)
  - [GrowthX to begin work on 1-2 sample content pieces for calibration](https://fathom.video/share/gvd-sLvSPCav3T9LVWsDMA4yzydWM_Kq?tab=summary&timestamp=1540.0)
  - [Prophecy to provide feedback on strategy and initial content samples](https://fathom.video/share/gvd-sLvSPCav3T9LVWsDMA4yzydWM_Kq?tab=summary&timestamp=1540.0)

action_items.description: Follow up w/ specific company goals/priorities post-exec offsite (by Mon)
Share Google Drive access w/ GrowthX team (incl. campaign docs, CEO whitepapers)
Share bootleg J&J session recording w/ GrowthX team
Develop initial content strategy & research for next week's meeting
Select 1-2 content assignments for initial calibration
Monitor Slack for GrowthX info requests, provide optimized responses
